name: worktree-deck
title: Worktree Deck
description: Track git worktrees and Codex sessions from Raycast
author: kazuhide

commands.name: worktree-deck
commands.title: Worktree Deck
commands.description: List git worktrees and Codex sessions

commands.name: worktree-status-menu-bar
commands.title: Worktree Status
commands.description: Show worktree session status counts in the menu bar

preferences.name: GIT_WORKTREE_PATH
preferences.title: Worktree Directory (~/.worktree-deck/worktrees)
preferences.description: Home-relative directory where git worktrees are created.

preferences.name: CODEX_HOME
preferences.title: Codex Home (~/.codex)
preferences.description: Home-relative directory where Codex stores sessions and configuration.

preferences.name: WORKTREE_DECK_SEARCH_DAYS
preferences.title: Session Search Days
preferences.description: Number of days to search for Codex sessions.

preferences.name: WORKTREE_DECK_DONE_THRESHOLD_DAYS
preferences.title: Done Threshold Days
preferences.description: Number of days after which a working session is treated as done.

scripts.check:all: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test:run
scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
